title: The One and Only Dick Gregory
original_title: The One and Only Dick Gregory
overview: This revealing portrait of comedian,  activist, pop-culture icon and thought leader Dick Gregory documents his many personal reinventions throughout the decades, from celebrity to civil rights hero and beyond, while hearing from the incredible entertainers who have been inspired by his blueprint.
